task_completion.description: Read the operations brief text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window is open displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/urban_ops_brief.txt.

task_completion.description: Access the parameters configuration menu in the flight control software
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl (or similar flight control GUI) Vehicle Setup menu is open, specifically navigated to the 'Parameters' section.
The parameter list or an edit dialog shows GPS_SATS_MIN set to 12 and GPS_HDOP_GOOD set to 100.
The parameter list or edit dialogs show COMPASS_USE, COMPASS_USE2, and COMPASS_USE3 all set to 0 (or unchecked/disabled).
The parameter list or an edit dialog shows EK3_SRC1_YAW set to 2.
The parameter list or an edit dialog shows DISARM_DELAY set to 5.

task_completion.description: Ensure all parameters are written to the flight controller
task_completion.visual_evidence: Clicking 'Save' in the parameter modification dialogs, or the parameter list displaying the updated values without any 'pending' or 'unsaved' highlights (typically green or red text in QGC indicates unsaved changes).

integrity.description: The agent used the flight control GUI (e.g., QGroundControl) to modify parameters
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the QGroundControl interface, utilizing its search bar or parameter tree, rather than just running a script in the terminal to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually spoof the result JSON file
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editor or terminal is shown manually creating or editing a file named /tmp/task_result.json.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely searched for and edited the parameters
integrity.visual_evidence: The search box in the Parameters menu is used to find specific parameters like 'GPS_SATS', 'COMPASS', 'EK3', or 'DISARM', followed by opening their respective edit dialogs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The operations brief is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/urban_ops_brief.txt. The required parameter values to be successfully set in the flight controller are: GPS_SATS_MIN = 12, GPS_HDOP_GOOD = 100, COMPASS_USE = 0, COMPASS_USE2 = 0, COMPASS_USE3 = 0, EK3_SRC1_YAW = 2, and DISARM_DELAY = 5.
